positive: A minimalist illustration of a stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset. The mountains should feature a variety of jagged, layered peaks and stylized pine trees, rendered in deep navy and slate grey. The foreground should include abstract, overlapping stylized fauna, such as leaping deer and soaring birds, also rendered in negative space and solid color silhouettes. Composition must be perfectly balanced and centralized, suitable for repeating pattern placement. Use a highly graphic, bold, vintage-poster aesthetic with crisp edges, high contrast, and limited color palette. The style should evoke linocut prints and modern screen printing. Clean, vector quality, white background. Highly detailed, award-winning design.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, writing, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, jpeg artifacts, messy, complex background, low detail, photorealism, gradient (unless part of solid color fill)
